---
title: "Import Tagged Bookmarks into Firefox"
date: 2012-12-19
forum: General Help

### Post by hwttdz on 2012-12-19
I have a bunch of bookmarks in a tagged xbel file and I'd like to import them into firefox with tags.  XBELFox seems to sadly not support tags (on import, it exported beautifully), here's an example bookmark:

```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE xbel PUBLIC "+//IDN python.org//DTD XML Bookmark Exchange Language 1.0//EN//XML" "http://www.python.org/topics/xml/dtds/xbel-1.0.dtd">
<!-- Generated by XBELFox -->
<xbel version="1.0" added="2012-11-21T13:08:51.228021Z">
    <bookmark added="2012-11-21T14:29:44.172024Z" href="http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=343808" modified="2012-12-19T09:07:29.652697Z">
      <title>dmg to iso</title>
      <desc> HOW TO: Dealing with the Foreign Animal ".dmg" (.dmg to iso burning) Tutorials &amp; Tips</desc>
      <info>
        <metadata tags="Linux,Ubuntu,community,distro,forum,forums,howto,humor,linux,opensource,support,ubuntu"/>
      </info>
    </bookmark>
</xbel>
```

---

### Post by slickymaster on 2012-12-19
Take a look at this entry: [Import/Export XBEL-File]("http://www.yacy-websearch.net/wiki/index.php/Dev:Bookmarks"). It may provide you some help.
